title: Resolve, to Establish the Commission to Study Lowering Property Taxes by Revising the State-Municipal Revenue Sharing Program
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 21, 2025
last_house_action: 4/8/2025 - The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/21/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on TAXATION suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on TAXATION Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
